title: Slime Kingdom
description: Vanilla+ Modpack for Slime Kingdom small private SMP
body:
## About the modpack
This modpack is created for a small and whitelist only SMP server called Slime Kingdom.
It is a Vanilla+ modpack with only a few mods, that do not entirely change the feel of the game, but spice things up, make Minecraft nicer, add some quality of life changes, and add things to do.

Featured points:
- Vanilla+
- Relatively easy to run (for best performance, use 4GB+ of memory)
- Fun to play with friends
- Spiced up gameplay that does not ruin the original feel of the game

## Modlist
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers/version/1.6.2) - Render the player skin layer in 3d!
- [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite/version/fabric-2.0.2-mc1.20.1)[YUNG's Better Desert Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-desert-temples/version/1.20-Fabric-3.0.3)
- [Amecs](https://modrinth.com/mod/amecs/version/1.3.10+mc.1.20.1) - Improves your keys & controls setup by providing modifier keys
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin/version/2.5.1+mc1.20) - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations/version/2.1.0)
- [Better Ladders](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ladders/version/0.0.2.1.20.1) - Modifies [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl/version/3.2.1+1.20-fabric)the vanilla ladder to be 3D and placeable anywhere without the need of supporting blocks
- [Better Than Llamas](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-than-llamas/version/1.2.0) - Makes Lammas fancier
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person/version/1.9.0) - Improves third person camera view.
- [Blahaj (Fabric) - replushed](https://modrinth.com/mod/blahaj_fabric/version/0.3.2) - Adds the popular Blåhaj plushies
- [Botarium](https://modrinth.com/mod/botarium/version/2.3.3)
- [Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on/version/2.1.2.7) - Carry On allows you to pick up Tile Entities and Mobs and carry them around!
- [CompleteConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/completeconfig/version/2.5.0)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads/version/0.10.26) - See who you're chatting with!
- [Chunk Loaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunk-loaders/version/1.2.8a-fabric-mc1.20.1)
- [Clean F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-f3/version/0.4.4) - Removes useless information from the debug screen.[Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api/version/5.2.2)
- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric/version/0.2.0+alpha.11.5+1.20.1) - A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft.
- [Connectible Chains [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/connectible_chains/version/v2.2.1+1.20.1) - Connect your fences/walls with a decorative chain!
- [Create: Bells & Whistles](https://modrinth.com/mod/bellsandwhistles/version/0.4.5-mc1.20.1-fabric) - Additions and adornments for the modern Create engineer.
- [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - Building Tools and Aesthetic [Vertical Slabs Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/vertical-slabs-compat)Technology
- [Create Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco/version/2.0.1-1.20.1-fabric) - Industrial decoration themed around the aesthetics of the Create mod.
- [Create: SandPaper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-sandpaper-[Mighty Mail (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mighty-mail-fabric)overhaul/version/1.6+1.20.1) - A addon to the amazing Create Mod that adds more variations of sandpapers. 
- [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice/version/3.0.0) - Making automation for Farmers Delight more sensible
- [Create: Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails/version/1.5.1-fabric-mc1.20.1) - Adding depth to Create's rail network & steam system
- [Creeper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul/version/3.0.1) - A mod which overhauls the vanilla creepers!
- [Delightful Creators [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/delightful-creators-fabric/version/1.1.8) - Delightful Creators is an addon for Farmer's Delight and Create which adds new recipes using Create.
- [Durability Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/durability-tooltip/version/1.1.5-fabric-mc1.20)
- [Emojiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/emojiful/version/4.2.0) - Emojis in minecraft
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/version/1.2.3) - EMF is an, OptiFine format, Custom Entity Model replacement mod available for Fabric and Forge.
- [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions/version/17.0.13)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities
- [Enderman Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderman-tweaks/version/0.3.1) - Adds Configuration options to endermen.
- [Fast Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-paintings/version/1.20-1.2.3) - Fixes painting rendering, increasing their performance 
- [fast-ip-ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping/version/mc1.20.4-v1.0.1)[Extra Thicc Packets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-thicc-packets)
- [Farmer's Delight [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric/version/1.4.3) - Farmer's Delight is a mod that gently expands upon farming and cooking in Minecraft.
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core/version/6.0.1) - Memory usage optimizations
- [Forgotten Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgotten-graves/version/1.20.1-3.2.5) - Minecraft (Fabric) mod that stores items and XP in a decaying grave upon death
- [Gilded Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/gildedarmor/version/1.8.0+fabric) - Gilded armor can be used to make piglins peaceful while using other armor.
- [Goblin Traders (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/goblin-traders-fabric)
- [Hamsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/hamsters/version/1.0.1-fabric)[Framework (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework-fabric)
- [Immersive Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-armors/version/1.6.1+1.20.1) - A lot of unique and vanilla-faithful armor sets.
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast/version/1.2.4+1.20.1) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft
- [Immersive Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-paintings/version/0.6.7+1.20.1) - Immersive Paintings allows users to create their own, Minecraft-stylized paintings
- [Infinity Buttons](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinitybuttons/version/4.0.1-fabric-1.20.1) - A mod which adds new exciting buttons!
- [Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-sorting/version/1.9.0-1.20) - Quick, simple, and lightweight inventory sorting
- [Iron Chests: Restocked](https://modrinth.com/mod/ironchests/version/5.0.2) - Iron Chests: Restocked provide multiple variants of chests
- [Item Collectors](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-collectors/version/1.1.8-fabric-mc1.20)[Just Enough Farmer's Recipes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight-jei-plugin)
- [Items Displayed [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/items-displayed/version/1.2.1-1.20.1) - A mod for builders and adventurers who would like to have their items placed in the world, not lying around in chests!
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade/version/11.7.0) -Shows information about what you are looking at.
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/version/15.2.0.27) -  View Items and Recipes
- [Just Hammers](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-hammers/version/2.0.3) - Adds hammers to the game.
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu/version/0.1.3) - Makes the game boot faster by deferring non-essential initialization
- [Let Me Despawn](https://modrinth.com/plugin/lmd/version/1.2.0) - Improves performance by tweaking mob despawn rules
- [Log Cleaner](https://modrinth.com/mod/log-cleaner/version/1.0.0) - A lightweight mod that cleans old, unused log files.
- [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr/version/0.7.29.75) - A mod that makes it so nobody misses out on Loot! 
- [Macaw's Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-bridges/version/2.1.0) - A simple mod that adds a lot of bridges!
- [Macaw's Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-furniture/version/3.2.2)
- [Macaw's Lights and Lamps](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-lights-and-lamps/version/1.0.6)
- [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib/version/1.4.1-fabric)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks/version/1.20-2.25-fabric) - Enhances inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons.
- [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants/version/1.2.2) - Adds new variants to existing mobs.
- [Neruina - Ticking Entity Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/neruina/version/1.3.0) - A Mod that prevents ticking-related crashes from bricking worlds
- [Not Enough Recipe Book [NERB]](https://modrinth.com/mod/nerb/version/0.3) - Completely removes recipe book
- [Plushie Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/plushie/version/1.4.0-fabric)
- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored/version/0.5.3+1.20.1) - Regions Unexplored is a biome mod that overhauls the overworld and nether in many ways. With 70+ new biomes to explore,
- [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod/version/1.20.1-2.6.15) - A Minecraft Mod to record, relive and share your experience.
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/version/fabric-1.20.1-2.4.32)
- [Smelting Touch](https://modrinth.com/mod/smeltingtouch/version/1.3.0) - Auto Smelt Enchantment adds a single enchant: Smelting Touch
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries/version/1.20-2.7.32) - Vanilla+ additions[YUNG's Better Desert Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-desert-temples/version/1.20-Fabric-3.0.3)
- [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack/version/1.20.1-9.1.9) - Unique and upgradeable backpacks
- [Tree Harvester](https://modrinth.com/mod/tree-harvester/version/1.20.1-8.6-fabric+forge+neo)
- [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets/version/3.7.1) - A data-driven accessory mod
- [What Are They Up To (Watut)](https://modrinth.com/mod/what-are-they-up-to/version/1.20.1-1.0.12) - Lets you see if players are typing, in a GUI, idle, with cool ingame visuals
- [YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-nether-fortresses/version/1.20-Fabric-2.0.5) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's Nether fortresses!
- [YUNG's Better Strongholds](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds/version/1.20-Fabric-4.0.3) - A complete redesign of Minecraft strongholds
- [YUNG's Better Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons/version/1.20-Fabric-4.0.3) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's dungeons!
- [YUNG's Better Desert Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-desert-temples/version/1.20-Fabric-3.0.3) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's desert temples!
- [YUNG's Better Jungle Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-jungle-temples/version/1.20-Fabric-2.0.4) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's jungle temples!
- [YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-ocean-monuments/version/1.20-Fabric-3.0.4) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's ocean monuments!
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify/version/2.11.2)
